$comment: SPDX-License-Identifier: Apache-2.0. Copyright (c) 2026 NVIDIA Corporation. Source of truth for skills.sh.json group titles, descriptions, and order. Subdomain slugs must match the catalog.subdomain enum in metadata.schema.json. Groups are emitted in alphabetical order by title.

agentic-ai.title: Agentic AI
agentic-ai.description: Build and operate agentic systems, including RAG workflows, evaluation harnesses, tool use, policy, sandboxing, agent configuration, and agent workflow automation.

ai-factory.title: AI Factory
ai-factory.description: Plan, deploy, and operate AI-factory-scale infrastructure for training, fine-tuning, and serving foundation models.

ai-storage.title: AI Storage
ai-storage.description: Design, deploy, and operate accelerated storage and data-pipeline infrastructure for AI training and inference workloads.

av-simulation.title: AV Simulation
av-simulation.description: Author and run autonomous-vehicle simulation, scenario generation, and validation workflows.

conversational-ai.title: Conversational AI
conversational-ai.description: Build conversational systems including ASR, TTS, dialogue, and voice-agent stacks.

cybersecurity.title: Cybersecurity
cybersecurity.description: Apply accelerated AI to security operations, threat detection, response, and policy enforcement.

data-science.title: Data Science
data-science.description: Prepare, analyze, explore, and model data for AI and accelerated analytics workflows that are not specific to one training, inference, or agent task.

decision-optimization.title: Decision Optimization
decision-optimization.description: Formulate and solve routing, scheduling, and numerical optimization problems using optimization solvers, APIs, services, and deployment workflows.

digital-twins.title: Digital Twins
digital-twins.description: Author, simulate, and operate physically based digital-twin scenes and pipelines.

extended-reality.title: Extended Reality
extended-reality.description: Develop AR, VR, and XR experiences, devices, and runtime services.

gaming.title: Gaming
gaming.description: Build, optimize, and ship gaming engines, runtime SDKs, and player-facing graphics features.

gpu-development.title: GPU Development
gpu-development.description: Develop, tune, profile, and integrate GPU kernels and accelerated code, including CUDA-adjacent workflows, autotuning, low-level performance work, and framework integration.

gpu-virtualization.title: GPU Virtualization
gpu-virtualization.description: Configure, deploy, and operate vGPU and shared-GPU infrastructure for virtualized environments.

in-vehicle-computing.title: In-Vehicle Computing
in-vehicle-computing.description: Build, validate, and deploy compute, perception, and software stacks running inside the vehicle.

inference-ai.title: Inference AI
inference-ai.description: Deploy, serve, optimize, and evaluate models for production inference, including quantization, runtime performance, and serving configuration.

infrastructure.title: Infrastructure
infrastructure.description: Provision, operate, and harden GPU compute, networking, and platform infrastructure.

networking.title: Networking
networking.description: Design, deploy, and operate accelerated networking fabrics, NICs, switches, and SDKs for AI and HPC.

physical-ai.title: Physical AI
physical-ai.description: Build, train, and deploy embodied AI systems that interact with the physical world.

quantum-computing.title: Quantum Computing
quantum-computing.description: Build, simulate, and deploy quantum and hybrid quantum-classical workloads.

robotics.title: Robotics
robotics.description: Build, validate, and deploy robotics perception, manipulation, navigation, and policy stacks.

robotics-simulation.title: Robotics Simulation
robotics-simulation.description: Author and run high-fidelity robotics simulation, synthetic data generation, and policy validation.

scientific-visualization.title: Scientific Visualization
scientific-visualization.description: Author and accelerate scientific-visualization pipelines for HPC, research, and engineering workloads.

simulation-modeling.title: Simulation Modeling
simulation-modeling.description: Build and accelerate physics-based simulation, surrogate modeling, and engineering analysis.

training-ai.title: Training AI
training-ai.description: Build, validate, tune, and maintain large-scale model training workflows, including distributed training, model support, training validation, performance tuning, and training-stack CI.

vision-ai.title: Vision AI
vision-ai.description: Build vision and video AI workflows for analytics, search, summarization, alerts, real-time understanding, and model integration.
